meta.description: An implementation blocker or unknown identified in a pre-flight assessment.

category.description: Blocker category (e.g. technical, dependency, knowledge gap).

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_3d1fa404_66fc_4287_9054_9d7d7c02b981" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "category" TEXT,
    "description" TEXT,
    "severity" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_3d1fa404_66fc_4287_9054_9d7d7c02b981" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_3d1fa40466fc4287_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
